chapter_title.ar: باب بَيْعِ الزَّرْعِ الْأَخْضَرِ وَ الْقَصِيلِ وَ أَشْبَاهِهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 133 – Selling the green plants, and the straw, and such like

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/360)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/360)

parts.text: عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ

text: نَهَى رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) عَنِ الْمُحَاقَلَةِ وَ الْمُزَابَنَةِ قُلْتُ وَ مَا هُوَ قَالَ أَنْ تَشْتَرِيَ حَمْلَ النَّخْلِ بِالتَّمْرِ وَ الزَّرْعَ بِالْحِنْطَةِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Safwan, from Aban, from Abdul Rahman Bin Abu Abdullah,

from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Rasool-Alah<sup>saww</sup> forbade from Al Muhaqala and Muzabana’. I said, ‘And what is it?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘If you were to buy a burden of the palm tree (unripened dates) with the dates, and the vegetation with the wheat’.
en.sarwar: 5. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Safwan from Aban from ‘Abd al- Rahman ibn abu ‘Abd Allah who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, prohibited al- Muhaqalah and al-Muzabanah .’ I then asked, ‘What are they?’ He (the Imam) said, ‘It is selling what a palm tree has just conceived in exchange for dates and green plantation for wheat.’”
